mapper.sql: id, username, email, password, nickname, bio, avatar_url, role, status, last_login_time, login_count, two_factor_enabled, two_factor_secret, oauth_provider, oauth_subject, oauth_email_verified, ban_type, ban_reason, ban_expires_at, banned_at, banned_by, banned_by_email, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email})
SELECT FROM users WHERE username = #{username} OR LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password, nickname, bio, avatar_url, role, status, last_login_time, login_count, two_factor_enabled, two_factor_secret, oauth_provider, oauth_subject, oauth_email_verified, ban_type, ban_reason, ban_expires_at, banned_at, banned_by, banned_by_email, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{bio}, #{avatarUrl}, #{role}, #{status}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{loginCount}, #{twoFactorEnabled}, #{twoFactorSecret}, #{oauthProvider}, #{oauthSubject}, #{oauthEmailVerified}, #{banType}, #{banReason}, #{banExpiresAt}, #{bannedAt}, #{bannedBy}, #{bannedByEmail}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, email = #{email}, nickname = #{nickname}, bio = #{bio}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET role = #{role}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET two_factor_enabled = #{enabled}, two_factor_secret = #{secret}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE users SET oauth_provider = #{oauthProvider}, oauth_subject = #{oauthSubject}, oauth_email_verified = #{oauthEmailVerified}, avatar_url = COALESCE(#{avatarUrl}, avatar_url), updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, ban_type = #{banType}, ban_reason = #{banReason}, ban_expires_at = #{banExpiresAt}, banned_at = #{bannedAt}, banned_by = #{bannedBy}, banned_by_email = #{bannedByEmail}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = #{role}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = #{role} AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE created_at >= #{start} AND created_at < #{end}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE last_login_time >= #{start} AND last_login_time < #{end}

SELECT FROM users WHERE username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
